SELECT ?s, bif:st_zmax(?o) as ?zmax FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER(?s != <point2d>) };
SELECT ?s, bif:st_zmax(?o) as ?zmax FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . { SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } } };
SELECT ?s, bif:st_zmax(?o) as ?zmax FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . OPTIONAL { ?s ?p ?otherO . } };
SELECT ?s, bif:st_zmax(?o) as ?zmax FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . ?s ?p2 ?o2 . FILTER(?o2 != ?o) };
SELECT ?s, bif:st_zmax(?o) as ?zmax FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { { SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } } UNION { SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s ?p2 ?o2 } } };
SELECT ?s, bif:st_zmax(?o) as ?zmax FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . BIND(bif:st_zmax(?o) AS ?max) FILTER(?max > 1) };
SELECT ?s, bif:st_zmax(?o) as ?zmax FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER(bif:st_zmax(?o) IS NOT NULL) };
